title: Fresh Animations Patch - Boy Why You So Ears
description: A Fresh Animations patch pack that allows "Boy Why You So Ears" to function with "Fresh Animations" wolf model.
body:
Model edit patch pack to allow for [JBCC](https://modrinth.com/user/JBCC)'s great model and texture edit, [Boy Why You So Ears](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/boy-why-you-so-ears), to be compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)' wolf model.

For the pack to function, it must be above any packs that edit the wolf model and the spotted wolf textures. IE, this pack should be placed above the base Fresh Animations. For things not to look funky, it also relies on the wolf armor and wolf collar models, which are provided in the base Fresh Animations pack.

Full credit for the original texture edit and model edit inspiration goes to the wonderful JBCC, and the base wolf model originates from [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)'s Fresh Animations pack.

Original description from Boy Why You So Ears:

> Gives the spotted wolf variant some big ol ears, like its real-life counterpart
> 
> !!! Requires Optifine or EMF+ETF !!!
> 
> Spotted wolves look a little more like painted wild dogs now! This resource pack should work in any version after wolf variants were added (1.20.5+)
